1.0.4

Usage: cricket [command] [options]

Options:
  --version        Show version information
  --help           Show help information

Commands:
  add-language     Add a new language
                   Ex: add-language -iso "En-US" -n "English"
  create-database  Create a new Database
  set-database     Set Database credentials

Run 'cricket [command] --help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Add a new language
 Ex: add-language -iso "En-US" -n "English"

Usage: cricket add-language [options]

Options:
  --help                      Show help information
  -iso|--iso-code <ISO Code>  ISO Code of the Language
  -n|--name <Language>        Language Name

result.stdout:
Create a new Database

Usage: cricket create-database [options]

Options:
  --help                                Show help information
  -db|--database <Create New Database>  Create a new Database. If no value
                                        passed, will use value stored on the
                                        system.
                                        If passed database is already present,
                                        it will update the database (if
                                        required)

Usage: cricket create-database [options]

Options:
  --help                                Show help information
  -db|--database <Create New Database>  Create a new Database. If no value
                                        passed, will use value stored on the
                                        system.
                                        If passed database is already present,
                                        it will update the database (if
                                        required)

result.stdout:
Set Database credentials

Usage: cricket set-database [options]

Options:
  --help                         Show help information
  -s|--server <Database Server>  Database Server Name
  -d|--database <Database Name>  Database
  -u|--user <User Name>          User Name to access database
  -p|--password <Password>       Password to access database
